CustomField.description: For Large Data Volume (LDV) orgs only. Limits the number of Contact records queried per chunk during hard credit rollup processing to prevent SOQL query timeouts. Leave blank for standard orgs; the system uses the default batch size. Only set this with guidance from support when rollup jobs timeout due to data volume.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: LDV orgs only. Maximum Contacts per query chunk during hard credit rollups. Leave blank unless rollup jobs are timing out.
CustomField.label: LDV: Contact Hard Credit Chunk Size
